issues.description: Work units tracked by the orchestrator

events.description: Append-only audit trail of all state changes

model-performance.sql: SELECT json_extract(e.detail, '$.model') as model, i.status, i.type, i.tags, COUNT(DISTINCT i.id) as issue_count, SUM(CASE WHEN i.status IN ('done', 'finalized') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successes, SUM(CASE WHEN i.status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failures, SUM(CAST(json_extract(e.detail, '$.input_tokens') AS INTEGER)) as total_input_tokens, SUM(CAST(json_extract(e.detail, '$.output_tokens') AS INTEGER)) as total_output_tokens FROM events e JOIN issues i ON e.issue_id = i.id WHERE e.event_type = 'tokens_used' AND json_extract(e.detail, '$.model') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY model, i.type ORDER BY model, i.type
model-performance.title: Model Performance by Issue Type
model-performance.description: Token usage, success rate, and failure rate broken down by model and issue type

model-costs.sql: SELECT json_extract(detail, '$.model') as model, COUNT(*) as events, SUM(CAST(json_extract(detail, '$.input_tokens') AS INTEGER)) as input_tokens, SUM(CAST(json_extract(detail, '$.output_tokens') AS INTEGER)) as output_tokens FROM events WHERE event_type = 'tokens_used' GROUP BY model ORDER BY output_tokens DESC
model-costs.title: Model Cost Summary

issue-timeline.sql: SELECT i.id, i.title, i.type, i.status, i.tags, i.model, i.created_at, i.closed_at, ROUND((julianday(COALESCE(i.closed_at, datetime('now'))) - julianday(i.created_at)) * 24 * 60, 1) as duration_minutes FROM issues i ORDER BY i.created_at DESC LIMIT 100
issue-timeline.title: Issue Timeline

retry-analysis.sql: SELECT i.id, i.title, i.type, i.tags, i.model, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.event_type = 'retry' THEN 1 END) as retries, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.event_type = 'agent_switch' THEN 1 END) as agent_switches, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.event_type = 'escalated' THEN 1 END) as escalations, i.status as final_status FROM issues i LEFT JOIN events e ON i.id = e.issue_id GROUP BY i.id HAVING retries > 0 OR agent_switches > 0 OR escalations > 0 ORDER BY retries DESC
retry-analysis.title: Retry Analysis
retry-analysis.description: Issues that required retries, agent switches, or escalation

agent-activity.sql: SELECT a.id, a.name, a.model, a.status, COUNT(DISTINCT e.issue_id) as issues_worked, MIN(e.created_at) as first_active, MAX(e.created_at) as last_active FROM agents a LEFT JOIN events e ON a.id = e.agent_id GROUP BY a.id ORDER BY last_active DESC
agent-activity.title: Agent Activity

notes-browser.sql: SELECT n.id, n.category, n.content, n.created_at, i.title as issue_title, a.name as agent_name FROM notes n LEFT JOIN issues i ON n.issue_id = i.id LEFT JOIN agents a ON n.agent_id = a.id ORDER BY n.created_at DESC LIMIT 200
notes-browser.title: Notes Browser
